title: citharexylum rigidum
intro: Citharexylum rigidum, also known as the Texas silverleaf, is a flowering plant species in the family Verbenaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Citharexylum rigidum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
